ilenameFilter Given a URL or directory name, this actor produces an array of file names in that directory that match an (optional) pattern. The file names that are returned are absolute. The pattern is a regular expression. For a reference

ttern is a regular expression. For a reference on regular expression syntax see: http://java.sun.com/docs/books/tutorial/extra/regex/index.html . FIXME: Useful options would be to output only files or only directories. Since: Ptolemy II 4.0 Versio
